title: Source Checkout Diagnostics Boundary
goal: Implement #489 by making the shipped host-repo report/default/module surfaces distinguish reusable diagnostics from source-checkout-only maintainer and dogfooding tooling.
non_goals: Do not remove useful target-repo diagnostics.
Do not remove repo-local dogfooding tools from this source checkout.
Do not redesign feature tiers broadly; #490 owns the generic module profile replacement.

intent.outcome: Ordinary host repos no longer see maintainer/dogfooding/codegen/extraction concepts as shipped diagnostic metadata, while this source checkout still exposes repo-local improvement routes.
intent.constraints: Stay on the current branch; preserve package dogfooding in this repo; keep host-repo diagnostics compact and useful.
intent.latitude: Add a small source-checkout detector and compact audience metadata where needed.
intent.escalation: Stop before broad root CLI decomposition or preset ontology replacement.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #489, refresh external evidence, then promote the next child in #485.
execution.proof: Run focused workspace CLI tests, contract/schema checks, proof selector, report/default smoke checks for host and source checkout, and planning closeout checks.

invariants: Target repos retain setup findings, validation friction, memory improvement, review-artifact, and external-adapter diagnostics where configured.
This repo can still dogfood through source-checkout routes.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Keep the root orchestrator thin, boring, generic, and strictly bounded.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #489 closes, promote the next child in #485.

iterative_follow_through.larger_intent: Keep the root orchestrator thin, boring, generic, and strictly bounded.
iterative_follow_through.current_slice: #489 separates host-repo diagnostics from package source-checkout-only maintainer and dogfooding routes.
iterative_follow_through.next_slice_selection_rule: After closing #489, reingest issues and promote the next open child under #485 unless external evidence changes priority.

open_only_when_pointed: raw planning state beyond the active item
module contracts outside changed report/default surfaces
context_budget.resume_hint: Use compact summary/report/proof outputs first; this slice does not require rereading historical archives.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Root CLI reporting/default helpers, module registry contract/schema, tests, and planning surfaces.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: Focused pytest for feature tier/report/defaults, full workspace CLI tests if root report helpers change, ruff, proof selector, planning checks.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Stop before splitting cli.py modules or replacing feature tiers.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Branch switching, mutating lifecycle behavior, generated package code, or broad schema inventory work.

stop_conditions.stop when: Host-repo report/default/module metadata excludes source-checkout-only maintainer concepts and tests prove the boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The change requires a broader feature-tier/profile redesign owned by #490.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: The work becomes root CLI responsibility decomposition (#488) or dependency review (#487).
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Ordinary target-repo diagnostics disappear or this repo loses dogfooding routes.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Stay on current branch; preserve useful target-repo diagnostics; keep source-checkout dogfooding available in this repo.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact source-checkout detection and compact boundary wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The boundary requires replacing feature tiers or splitting root CLI responsibilities.

active_milestone.scope: Separate reusable host diagnostics from source-checkout-only maintainer tooling in compact report/default/module metadata.
active_milestone.ready: Lifecycle hardening lane is closed and #489 is the selected first slice for #485.

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, close #489, refresh external evidence, and promote the next #485 child.

validation_commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "modules_command_lists or improvement_intake or default_profile_returns_router or docs_heavy_repo"
uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py
uv run ruff check src tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/module_registry.json tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/source-checkout-diagnostics-boundary.plan.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section improvement_intake --format json
validation_commands.result: passed: host/default payload hides source-checkout-only dogfooding subtype

completion_criteria: Target-repo diagnostics have explicit external value and shipped justification.
Startup/report/defaults output no longer advertises repo-local machinery to ordinary host repos.

execution_run.what happened: Separated reusable target-repo improvement diagnostics from package source-checkout-only dogfooding/maintainer signals in defaults, report routing, and module registry metadata.
execution_run.scope touched: Root CLI report/default helpers, module registry metadata, workspace CLI tests, and planning closeout surfaces.
execution_run.changed surfaces: Improvement-intake payload now reports a target-repo audience by default and adds dogfooding_friction only when the target is the agentic-workspace source checkout; planning module metadata no longer advertises maintainer command guidance as shipped host-repo capability.
execution_run.validations run: Focused workspace CLI tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, contract tooling check, planning surface check, proof selector, planning doctor, and defaults smoke check.
execution_run.result for continuation: #489 is ready to archive and close; #486, #487, #488, and #490 remain under #485.
execution_run.next step: Archive plan, commit, push, close #489, refresh external evidence, then promote the next #485 child.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Ordinary host-repo startup/report/default metadata no longer advertises package dogfooding or maintainer-only diagnostics, while the package source checkout still exposes dogfooding routes for self-improvement.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused and full workspace CLI tests passed, contract/planning checks passed, ruff passed, and package proof selected the expected proof lanes.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archive this execplan as proof/history after closeout.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (memory/docs/config): No durable Memory/docs/config promotion needed; one planning friction signal should be routed as an issue.
execution_summary.resume from: Reingest open issues and promote the next child under #485.

proof_report.validation proof: Focused and full workspace CLI tests passed, contract/planning checks passed, ruff passed, and package proof selected the expected proof lanes.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Focused workspace CLI tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, contract tooling check, planning surface check, proof selector, planning doctor, and defaults smoke check.

finished_run_review.config compliance: used package workflow surfaces for startup, summary, proof, doctor, defaults, report, and closeout

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane module-boundary-compression activates a fresh bounded slice.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

signals found: Hand-authored execplan initially missed projection fields (iterative_follow_through and context_budget), causing summary hierarchy projection noise during closeout.
signals routed: Create a narrow planning issue for a projection-complete execplan scaffold/check so active plans are easier to author correctly.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.
